THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKADSEN, ERICA NICOLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SINGH, DALEEP H. DBA DALEEPS $430.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $465.00, DEFT WIAVES IRREGULARITIES IN THE SERVICE OF CLAIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
